actions.value: Edge does not have access to orders made through our partners in the app. For an update, please reach out to Wyre directly at https://wyre-support.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new or send your Wyre order information and we can reach out to them on your behalf to get order status. Note: Wyre will not give us any personal information regarding your order you will have to contact them yourself for account changes.
